message:
fix(ndarray,iter,ufunc): add overlap detection, readonly tracking, and reduction edge cases

NdLayout (fnp-ndarray):
- Add writeable and has_internal_overlap fields to NdLayout for
  accurate view semantics matching NumPy behavior
- Implement detect_internal_overlap() to identify aliased indices
  in strided views using offset set analysis
- Enforce readonly propagation: broadcast views and sliding windows
  are automatically marked read-only

Iterator (fnp-iter):
- Fix overlap_copy_policy to accept zero-length transfers as NoCopy
  instead of erroring — zero-length copies are valid no-ops
- Update test expectations: rename overlap_rejected fixtures to
  overlap_is_no_copy reflecting corrected semantics

UFuncArray (fnp-ufunc):
- Fix any/all reductions over empty axes to return correct identity
  values (false for any, true for all)

Random (fnp-random):
- Fix type casting in binomial sampling (usize→i64 conversions)

Conformance:
- Expand oracle test coverage (datetime: 22→29, dtype: 25→30)
- Update adversarial case fixtures for corrected overlap behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

         shape: case.stride_shape.clone(),
         strides,
         item_size: case.stride_item_size,
+        writeable: true,

     });
 
     if let Some(as_strided_case) = &case.as_strided {
